zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie de Sully於大約1360年出生在法國崔洛易特奧爾萊安斯素利-素-洛易時，她的父親Louis de SULLY32歲，母親Isabeau de Craon36歲。她於1382年與Guy VI de La Trémoïlle結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年7月16日在法國阿奎泰培列內-阿特藍可斯保羅享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie de Sully于大约1360年出生在法国崔洛易特奧爾萊安斯素利-素-洛易时，她的父亲Louis de SULLY32岁，母亲Isabeau de Craon36岁。她于1382年与Guy VI de La Trémoïlle结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1409年7月16日在法国阿奎泰培列內-阿特藍可斯保羅享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sully
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armelle, Christophe, Geralde, Luce, Pierre, Reynald.
English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from any of the three places called Sully in Calvados (Normandy), Aisne (Picardy), and Loiret (Centre); see 6 below.

English: of Norman origin, perhaps a habitational name from Sully (Glamorgan). However, the placename is manorial in origin, from the Norman surname in 1 above, which is recorded in Glamorgan in the 12th century.

variants.name: Soley
meanings: Catalan: variant of Solell, a topographic name from solell ‘sunny side, southern slope’, from a derivative of sol ‘sun’. Compare Sol 2.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie de Sully was born about 1360, in Sully-sur-Loire, Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France, her father, Louis de SULLY, was 32 and her mother, Isabeau de Craon, was 36. She married Guy VI de La Trémoïlle in 1382. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 16 July 1409, in Pau, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, France, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie de Sully est née environ 1360, à Sully-sur-Loire, Orléans, Loiret, Centre, France, son père, Louis de SULLY, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabeau de Craon, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Guy VI de La Trémoïlle en 1382. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 juillet 1409, à Pau, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ru.Sully-sur-Loire,45315,Loiret,Centre-Val: сулли-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie de Sully родилась около 1360 г. в местности сулли-сур-лоир, орлeанс, лоирет, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Louis de SULLY было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabeau de Craon, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guy VI de La Trémoïlle в 1382 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 16 июля 1409 г. в местности пау, пирeнeес-атлантикуесь, аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 50 лет.

es.Sully-sur-Loire,45315,Loiret,Centre-Val: Sully-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie de Sully nació aproximadamente 1360, en Sully-sur-Loire, Orléans, Loiret, Centre, Francia, su papá, Louis de SULLY, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabeau de Craon, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Guy VI de La Trémoïlle en 1382. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de julio de 1409, en Pau, Pyrénées-Atlantiques, Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 50 años.
